personal_information.introduction: Versatile AI Engineer with a background in developing deep learning models and using AI in products. I have authored two open source libraries, out of which one has over 300,000 downloads with 750 stars on GitHub.

education.description:
Graduated Cum Laude
ML Team Lead at Serpentine AI — research group developing AI models for brain signal processing.

Part of a student Baja Racing Team, Firebolt Racing.
Worked as Chassis Designer and Vehicle Integration Head.
Designed and manufactured 3 cars over 3 years.

projects.description:
Author of EmbedAnything — 750 GitHub stars and over 300,000 downloads.
Provides fast multi-modal embeddings generation.
Contributed several models to open-source projects.
projects.title: EmbedAnything

projects.description:
Built a multi-platform desktop application that indexes local files and allows semantic search across them.
Used RAG techniques like hybrid search and reranking to improve retrieval quality.
Used Ollama for local LLMs and OpenAI, Gemini API for cloud LLMs.
projects.title: Starlight Search

projects.description:
An open-source agentic library and agent API server for intelligent chat applications.
Implemented CodeAgent architecture where the agent writes Python code to execute tool calls.
Deployed the agent as an API on AWS cloud services using EC2 instance.
projects.title: Lumo Agent

projects.description:
Developed a robust deep learning model to predict limb movements from EEG Motor Imagery data in real-time.
Implemented data pipelines to handle real-time data with filtering and buffering.
Presented a live demo of the application at Dutch Design Week 2024.
projects.title: AI Motor Imagery

certification.course_name: Improving Deep Neural Networks: Hyperparameter Tuning, Regularization and Optimization
Introduction to Computer Science and Programming Using Python

work_experience.description:
Improve machine learning model performance on out-of-distribution data using domain adaptation.
Pre-training foundational vision models for optical sensor data.

Developed Generative AI pipelines for user persona detection and an AI coach for children.
Deployed serverless AI functions in Azure and integrated RAG pipelines for the coach using Azure services.

Employed Deep Learning Models on optical sensor data to predict KPIs for metrology.
Provided uncertainty estimation with Bayesian Inference methods to make the model more robust.
Developed Denoising Diffusion Models resulting in 93% accuracy in process drift prediction.
Implemented Mechanistic Interpretability techniques like Sparse Autoencoders and Post-hoc XAI like GradCam.

Spearheaded product strategy contributing to the successful launch of innovative products and features.
Established customer feedback loops, enabling continuous iteration and measurable product improvements.
Directed cross-functional software and hardware teams to ensure timely delivery of high-quality products.
Co-inventor of 7 patents in the fields of Additive Manufacturing and Composites.

Joined the startup as the first founding employee.
Pioneered the development of Asia's first carbon fiber 3D printer by leading a team of 10 engineers.
Built backend for the slicer in Django with tool-path optimizations, resulting in 20% faster prints than other slicers.
